g.text: Cron-driven task dispatch: TOML sync on startup → tick loop → cron evaluation → dispatch mode routing
Each butler gets a deterministic offset: SHA-256(butler_name) mod min(15min, cron_cadence-1) → spread DB load across time, no thundering herd on shared cron boundaries
until_at guard: if next_run_at > until_at → auto-disable task (enabled=false, next_run_at=NULL)
CancelledError: asyncio.shield(tick_task) — in-progress tick() finishes before loop exits on shutdown
